text: Both the Hebrew text and the Latin version seem to imply that there were two separate cities called Gethremmon; but this may be due to an oversight in copying. The Septuagint Greek has a different name in this verse, Jebatha (or perhaps Bethsa); a different name again, Baalam, is found in I Par. 6.70.

The Hebrew text is here uncertain; both the Septuagint Greek and Latin versions give five cities instead of four, if Bosor is included. Probably Jaser has been copied into this verse by mistake, and belongs really to the verse following (under Gad).
